scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build:css: mkdir -p frontend/dist/css field/dist/css && cleancss -o frontend/dist/css/frontend.css frontend/src/css/frontend.css && cleancss -o field/dist/css/field.css field/src/css/field.css
scripts.build:js: mkdir -p field/dist/js frontend/dist/js && terser field/src/js/field.js -o field/dist/js/field.js -c -m && terser frontend/src/js/copy-button.js -o frontend/dist/js/copy-button.js -c -m
